sql_array: UPDATE test_time_bucket SET event_time = time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 week', event_time, 'America/New_York') WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT time_bucket(INTERVAL '2 days', event_time, 'UTC') AS bucketed_time FROM test_time_bucket;
DELETE FROM test_time_bucket WHERE event_time < TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 00:00:00+00';
